settings.heading: A central gateway for practical business operations support
settings.text: Find services, resources, toolkits, partner offers and support pathways that help keep business work moving with clearer ownership and next steps.

settings.heading: Start with the operational outcome
settings.text: Use the hub to choose between service support, self-serve resources, marketplace offers and help pathways.

settings.title: I need operations support
settings.text: Browse on-demand services for workflows, admin systems, controls and operating support.

settings.title: I need templates or tools
settings.text: Use practical resources, toolkits and documents when the work can start self-serve.

settings.title: I need support or direction
settings.text: Use support pathways when the right service, resource or next step is unclear.

settings.heading: Support for recurring business work
settings.text: Use these categories to move quickly into real store destinations without adding one-off page files.

settings.title: Business operations
settings.text: Services for recurring work, controls, accountability and operating rhythm.

settings.title: Admin systems
settings.text: Support for registers, calendars, documentation, knowledge bases and practical workflows.

settings.title: Marketplace and partner offers
settings.text: Access business offers, marketplace support and partner pathways where configured.

settings.heading: Useful starting points for business operators
settings.text: These links keep users moving without sending them to destinations that do not exist yet.

settings.title: Operations On-Demand Services
settings.text: A real collection for operational services and support products.

settings.title: Compliance Calendar and Obligations Register
settings.text: Implementation support for recurring obligations, calendars and registers.

settings.title: Business NBN
settings.text: Check business connectivity readiness and next steps.

settings.heading: Partner offers and operational opportunities
settings.text: Use configured offers or route visitors to the marketplace while partner offer metaobjects are finalized.

settings.title: Marketplace pathways
settings.text: Explore marketplace support, buyer and seller pathways, partner offers and related guidance.

settings.title: Marketplace Seller Compliance Toolkit
settings.text: A real active toolkit for sellers managing marketplace terms, listings, refunds and customer communications.

settings.heading: Use support when the right operational path is unclear
settings.text: Send the context and the outcome you need so RBP can route you to the right service, resource or next step.
settings.aside_text: Tell us what is stuck, what has already been tried, who owns the work and whether you need advice, delivery or a self-serve resource.

settings.heading: Find the operational pathway that fits the work
settings.text: Start with services, essentials, marketplace offers or support, depending on what the business needs next.
